queries.query: Make this dashboard look less like a generic AI template — tighten the hierarchy, type, and spacing.
Design a new analytics dashboard screen for our app from scratch.
Prototype this onboarding flow as a clickable HTML mockup with a tweaks panel for density and color.
Author a design system with color/type tokens, components, and preview pages.
Turn these notes into an HTML slide deck with speaker notes for a stakeholder review.
Add atmospheric motion and animated depth to this landing hero.
Prepare this prototype for standalone HTML export and direct editing in the artifact host.
Run an anti-slop visual review of this UI and give me a polish plan.
Run a formal WCAG 2.2 accessibility audit of our checkout — no redesign, just findings.
Our signup form is confusing and users keep abandoning it — do a usability audit and list the heuristic violations.
Design the error envelope and pagination shape for our REST API before 1.0.
Review the developer experience of this CLI's --help output.
Refactor this service into clean architecture layers.
